examples:
Command Example
!irisk-rescan-domain domain=demisto.com
Human Readable Output
4. Get the issues for a domain
Returns the issues located under the specified domain.
Base Command
irisk-get-domain-issues
Input

!irisk-rescan-domain domain=demisto.com
Human Readable Output
4. Get the issues for a domain
Returns the issues located under the specified domain.
Base Command
irisk-get-domain-issues
Input
Argument Name
name: irisk-get-domain-issues

outputs.description: The name of the domain against which it was checked. C2sec.Domain.Issue.ID Issue ID.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Name

outputs.description: Asset associated with the issues. For example, IP addresses, website URLs, and so on. C2sec.Domain.Issue.Component The component used in the issue.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Issue.Asset

outputs.description: The display name of the component being used. C2sec.Domain.Issue.Details The details for the issue.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Issue.ComponentDisplay

outputs.description: The name of the issue. C2sec.Domain.Issue.Severity
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Issue.Issue
